creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Helo

Am 5/24/12 1:20 PM, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of devel/libvanessa_logger,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/168300 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/168300
> 

Looks fine. Please commit this update. Thank you

Regards,
Tom
